title: 日本ダービーの後に・誰かの夢の次は

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text: Well, what's done is done. Time to move on—

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
This is horrible... This is the worst! Winning the
Derby was my dream!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: But... I can't just keep crying about it...

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
I'm going to win the next one... and make my
moms proud!

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
She's already ready to press on. That's one
resilient Umamusume.

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
But who knows... I might be the one to win next
time.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Both Seiun Sky and Special Week have lost to
another racer. The crowd's reaction...

text_block_list.name: Fan B
text_block_list.text: Aaargh! Spe lost, but she'll make up for it later!

text_block_list.name: Fan C
text_block_list.text:
That's right, she's the real deal! My eyes are on
Spe for the next race too! Everything will be
different this summer!

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
Spe sure is popular. She may have lost, but that
hasn't shaken everyone's hope for her.

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
Yeah, but... I agree with what they're saying. She's
still improving.

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
Guess that just means I have to get better before
the Kikuka Sho too... Psh, yeah right.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
With the last race of the Classic Triple Crown on
the horizon, the Umamusume welcome in the
coming summer.
